nodes.label: 6. Error Cascade — fix error PERTAMA dulu
nodes.norm_label: 6. error cascade — fix error pertama dulu

nodes.label:
7. Unicode characters + line breaks in ternary — fatal
```pine
// ❌ ERROR (CE10156) — ternary broken across lines + Unicode → in comment
f_scoreCashFlow(float cf, float mcapVal) =>
    na(cf) ? na :
    f_scoreHigher(cf / mcapVal * 100, -2, 5)

// ✅ CORRECT — single line + ASCII only
f_scoreCashFlow(float cf, float mcapVal) =>
    na(cf) or na(mcapVal) or mcapVal == 0 ? na : f_scoreHigher(cf / mcapVal * 100, -2, 5)
```
nodes.norm_label:
7. unicode characters + line breaks in ternary — fatal
```pine
// ❌ error (ce10156) — ternary broken across lines + unicode → in comment
f_scorecashflow(float cf, float mcapval) =>
    na(cf) ? na :
    f_scorehigher(cf / mcapval * 100, -2, 5)

// ✅ correct — single line + ascii only
f_scorecashflow(float cf, float mcapval) =>
    na(cf) or na(mcapval) or mcapval == 0 ? na : f_scorehigher(cf / mcapval * 100, -2, 5)
```
